_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_42_note: Session 42 (2026-06-05, Friday): MRVL deep session (event_queue: DCF re-run). Key findings: (1) Broadcom Q3 AI guidance miss ($16B vs $17.2B high analyst est.) triggered broad semiconductor selloff June 4 — MU -7.74% to $996.00 (corrects S41 $1,070 intraday est), MRVL -5.55% to $301.65, ANET -4.79%. AVGO maintained $100B 2027 target — selloff is expectation reset, not thesis cut. (2) NVDA June 4 confirmed $216.34 (corrects S41 ~$228 intraday est; June 4 was ex-div date for $0.25/qtr). (3) ASML June 4 $1,757.47 (+1.80% — bucked selloff). (4) TSM ~$446.69 est June 4 (+2.3%est; annual shareholders' meeting June 4 approved 2025 results). (5) MRVL DCF re-run: IV $125.63, MoS -58.4%, SELL/AVOID at $301.65. Stifel raised MRVL PT to $321 (street-high). MRVL entity: corrected June 3 close to $319.40 (was $286.70); added June 4 Broadcom selloff + Stifel PT entries. Custom-silicon concept updated with Broadcom Q3 guidance miss recalibration. Phase 1b (OPEN 42%6=0): no qualifying episodes found in 14 days. Phase 1c (OPEN 42%6=0): optical networking bottleneck reinforces COHR watchlist — no new additions. TSM May revenue ~June 10 remains primary upcoming catalyst. All 7 SELL/AVOID; TSM mildest -14.0% MoS.

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 4 confirmed close $996.00 (S41 ~$1,070 was intraday high — AVGO selloff pulled MU -7.74%). Susquehanna PT $1,750. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis; Q3/Q4 pricing still rising. No deep session before June 24.

May monthly revenue release ~June 10 (pattern: April released May 8; May expected ~June 10). April was NT$410.73B (+17.5% YoY), 2nd-highest ever. 3nm ASP hike +15% H2 2026; 3nm capacity to 180K WPM. Ex-dividend $0.955 ex-date June 11. Q2 earnings July 16. June 4 confirmed close ~$446.69 est. (+2.3%est; annual shareholders' meeting passed). DCF re-run to follow May revenue release.

June 4 confirmed close $1,757.47 (+1.80% — bucked AVGO selloff). DCF last run May 22 (14 days; 30-day threshold June 21). Intel accepted High-NA EXE:5200 for HVM. Morgan Stanley EUR 1,660 PT. Q2 2026 results expected mid-July. Priority: run DCF before June 21 threshold or when material news surfaces.

June 4: -4.79% to ~$166.03 est. (AVGO selloff). DCF last run May 22 (14 days). MoS -23.6% SELL/AVOID. No company-specific catalyst — macro selloff. FY2026 $11.5B; $8.9B non-cancel purchase commitments. Q2 2026 results expected late July. Monitor.

June 4 confirmed close ~$348 est. (+8.72% net from June 3 $320.09; intraday high $372.37 then pulled back with AVGO selloff). MoS -67.9% SELL/AVOID. Deep session June 3 (S40). No new deep session needed — thesis confirming but valuation gap widening.

_event_queue_note: Session 42: MRVL deep session complete (DCF re-run IV $125.63, MoS -58.4%; entity corrected + 2 new entries). MRVL removed from leading position in queue (processed). Next priority: TSM May revenue ~June 10 (check start of next session). ASML DCF threshold June 21 — if no other event, ASML is rotation target next session. MU gated until June 24. Rotation advances to ASML (skip MU — gated).
